name: telos-ai-forge
description: TELOS ai-forge: a pattern-library-driven forge for AI architectures. Phase A: library substrate + a production-shaped RAG pattern, driven to merge_status:ready over the real gate + Ed25519 ledger + merkle-dag.

scripts.check: node --check pattern.mjs && node --check generators.mjs && node --check checks/check-node.mjs && node --check scripts/test-pattern.mjs && node --check scripts/test-generators.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node scripts/test-pattern.mjs && node scripts/test-generators.mjs
